info.title: Dermatolog Pro self-hosted Device Bridge production hardening
info.description: Stage 4V exposes self-hosted Device Bridge worker hardening metrics: stale workers, queue age, retry/backoff pressure, cleanup candidates, and the active retention policy. It does not expose worker tokens, raw command payloads, raw command results, storage paths, patient names, signed URLs, or browser hardware APIs.

get.summary: Read Device Bridge worker production hardening metrics
get.description: Returns safe system-admin metadata for queue backoff, idempotent lifecycle monitoring, stale worker detection, and retention cleanup planning.

200.description: Safe Device Bridge worker hardening projection

403.description: Only system_admin can read worker hardening metrics
